use_cases: Footer navigation links to social media profiles
Contact page social media link icons
Bio or profile page social connections
Marketing landing page social follow buttons
Header or sidebar social media navigation
ai_summary: A social media icon component with circular icons that fill with color on hover and display tooltips. Each icon is customizable with its own color, supports external links, and includes smooth CSS transitions for the fill animation and tooltip reveal. Ideal for footers, contact pages, or profile sections requiring social media links.
